rules.en: Drivers under 21: illegal at 0.01% BAC
rules.zh: 21岁以下 → 0.01% 即违法
rules.zhHant: 21歲以下 → 0.01% 即違法

rules.en: Drivers on DUI probation: illegal at 0.01% BAC
rules.zh: DUI缓刑期 → 0.01% 即违法
rules.zhHant: DUI緩刑期 → 0.01% 即違法

rules.en: Commercial drivers or carrying paid passengers
rules.zh: 商业驾照/载客 → 0.04% 即违法
rules.zhHant: 商業駕照/載客 → 0.04% 即違法

rules.en: Regular drivers 21 and over
rules.zh: 21岁以上普通驾驶人 → 0.08% 即违法
rules.zhHant: 21歲以上普通駕駛人 → 0.08% 即違法

questions.stem_en: What is the legal BAC limit for drivers under 21 in California?
questions.stem_zh: 加州21岁以下驾驶人的合法BAC上限是多少？
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州21歲以下駕駛人的合法BAC上限是多少？
questions.explanation_en: Under California's zero-tolerance law, drivers under 21 face penalties at a BAC of just 0.01%.
questions.explanation_zh: 加州对21岁以下驾驶人实行零容忍政策，BAC达到0.01%即违法。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州對21歲以下駕駛人實行零容忍政策，BAC達到0.01%即違法。

questions.stem_en: A commercial driver operating a vehicle with passengers can be cited for DUI at a BAC of:
questions.stem_zh: 商业驾驶人载客时，BAC达到多少即可被判DUI？
questions.stem_zhHant: 商業駕駛人載客時，BAC達到多少即可被判DUI？
questions.explanation_en: Commercial drivers or those carrying paid passengers are held to a stricter 0.04% BAC standard.
questions.explanation_zh: 商业驾照或载付费乘客时，BAC标准为0.04%。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 商業駕照或載付費乘客時，BAC標準為0.04%。

questions.stem_en: A driver on DUI probation is subject to the same BAC limit as:
questions.stem_zh: DUI缓刑期的驾驶人适用与哪类驾驶人相同的BAC标准？
questions.stem_zhHant: DUI緩刑期的駕駛人適用與哪類駕駛人相同的BAC標準？

options.text_en: There is no limit during probation

questions.explanation_en: Drivers on DUI probation share the same 0.01% BAC threshold as under-21 drivers.
questions.explanation_zh: DUI缓刑期的BAC标准和21岁以下相同，都是0.01%。
questions.explanation_zhHant: DUI緩刑期的BAC標準和21歲以下相同，都是0.01%。

questions.stem_en: How long does a DUI conviction remain on your driving record in California?
questions.stem_zh: 在加州，DUI定罪记录会在驾驶记录上保留多长时间？
questions.stem_zhHant: 在加州，DUI定罪記錄會在駕駛記錄上保留多長時間？
questions.explanation_en: A DUI conviction stays on your California driving record for 10 years.
questions.explanation_zh: DUI记录在加州驾驶记录上保留10年。
questions.explanation_zhHant: DUI記錄在加州駕駛記錄上保留10年。

questions.stem_en: What is the maximum jail time for a first-time DUI offense in California?
questions.stem_zh: 加州初犯DUI的最长监禁时间是多久？
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州初犯DUI的最長監禁時間是多久？
questions.explanation_en: A first-time DUI offense carries a maximum penalty of 6 months in county jail.
questions.explanation_zh: 初犯DUI最高面临6个月监禁。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 初犯DUI最高面臨6個月監禁。

rules.en: Max speed on icy roads
rules.zh: 结冰路面 ≤ 5mph
rules.zhHant: 結冰路面 ≤ 5mph

rules.en: Blind intersections, alleys; near railroad crossing when view blocked within 400 ft
rules.zh: 盲区路口/小巷 15mph；铁路看不清400英尺 → 15mph
rules.zhHant: 盲區路口/小巷 15mph；鐵路看不清400英尺 → 15mph

rules.en: School zone (within 500 ft with children); business/residential districts
rules.zh: 学区（500英尺内有儿童）25mph；商业/住宅区 25mph
rules.zhHant: 學區（500英尺內有兒童）25mph；商業/住宅區 25mph

rules.en: Heavy rain/snow when visibility is under 100 ft
rules.zh: 大雨雪能见度<100英尺 → ≤30mph
rules.zhHant: 大雨雪能見度<100英尺 → ≤30mph

rules.en: Two-lane undivided highways; towing trailers
rules.zh: 双向两车道/拖拽拖车 55mph
rules.zhHant: 雙向兩車道/拖曳拖車 55mph

rules.en: Freeway ideal speed
rules.zh: 高速理想限速 65mph
rules.zhHant: 高速理想限速 65mph

questions.stem_en: What is the maximum speed limit in a residential district?
questions.stem_zh: 住宅区的最高限速是多少？
questions.stem_zhHant: 住宅區的最高限速是多少？
questions.explanation_en: The speed limit in residential and business districts is 25 mph unless otherwise posted.
questions.explanation_zh: 住宅区和商业区限速25mph，除非另有标识。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 住宅區和商業區限速25mph，除非另有標識。

questions.stem_en: When driving near a railroad crossing and you cannot see clearly for 400 feet in both directions, you must:
questions.stem_zh: 在铁路道口附近行驶且无法看清两侧400英尺时，你必须：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在鐵路道口附近行駛且無法看清兩側400英尺時，你必須：

options.text_en: Slow down to 15 mph or less

questions.explanation_en: If you cannot see 400 feet in both directions at an uncontrolled railroad crossing, reduce speed to 15 mph or less.
questions.explanation_zh: 无信号铁路道口看不清两侧400英尺 → 降至15mph以下。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 無信號鐵路道口看不清兩側400英尺 → 降至15mph以下。

questions.stem_en: When driving in heavy rain and visibility is less than 100 feet, you should not drive faster than:
questions.stem_zh: 大雨中行驶且能见度不足100英尺时，最高不应超过：
questions.stem_zhHant: 大雨中行駛且能見度不足100英尺時，最高不應超過：
questions.explanation_en: When visibility drops below 100 feet due to rain, fog, or dust, do not exceed 30 mph.
questions.explanation_zh: 大雨/雾/沙尘能见度不足100英尺 → 不超过30mph。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 大雨/霧/沙塵能見度不足100英尺 → 不超過30mph。

questions.stem_en: The maximum speed limit when towing a trailer on a two-lane undivided highway is:
questions.stem_zh: 在双车道非分隔公路上拖拽拖车的最高限速是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在雙車道非分隔公路上拖曳拖車的最高限速是：
questions.explanation_en: On two-lane undivided highways, or when towing a trailer, the speed limit is 55 mph.
questions.explanation_zh: 双车道非分隔公路或拖拽拖车限速55mph。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙車道非分隔公路或拖曳拖車限速55mph。

questions.stem_en: You should not exceed ___ mph on icy roads.
questions.stem_zh: 结冰路面上你不应超过___mph。
questions.stem_zhHant: 結冰路面上你不應超過___mph。
questions.explanation_en: On icy roads, do not exceed 5 mph. On wet roads, reduce speed by 5-10 mph.
questions.explanation_zh: 结冰路面不超5mph；湿滑路面降速5-10mph。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 結冰路面不超5mph；濕滑路面降速5-10mph。

rules.en: Min passing distance for bicycles; parallel parking +3ft; disability ramp 3ft no parking
rules.zh: 超车自行车 ≥3英尺；平行泊车位+3英尺；残疾坡道3英尺禁停
rules.zhHant: 超車自行車 ≥3英尺；平行泊車位+3英尺；殘疾坡道3英尺禁停

rules.en: No parking within 15 ft of fire hydrant, railroad tracks, or crosswalk with curb extension
rules.zh: 消防栓/铁轨/有延伸人行道 15英尺禁停
rules.zhHant: 消防栓/鐵軌/有延伸人行道 15英尺禁停

rules.en: Parallel parking: wheels within 18 inches of curb
rules.zh: 平行泊车车轮距路缘 ≤18英寸
rules.zhHant: 平行泊車車輪距路緣 ≤18英寸

rules.en: No parking within 20 ft of crosswalk (no curb extension)
rules.zh: 无延伸人行横道20英尺禁停
rules.zhHant: 無延伸人行橫道20英尺禁停

rules.en: No passing within 100 ft of intersection/bridge/tunnel; signal turns 100 ft ahead
rules.zh: 路口等100英尺禁超车；转弯提前100英尺打灯
rules.zhHant: 路口等100英尺禁超車；轉彎提前100英尺打燈

rules.en: Follow emergency vehicle ≥300 ft; dim headlights following within 300 ft; passenger car braking at 55mph = 300 ft
rules.zh: 跟紧急车辆≥300英尺；近光跟车300英尺；客车55mph刹车300英尺
rules.zhHant: 跟緊急車輛≥300英尺；近光跟車300英尺；客車55mph剎車300英尺

rules.en: Signal 5 sec (~400 ft) before freeway exit; truck braking at 55mph = 400 ft
rules.zh: 高速出口提前400英尺打灯；卡车55mph刹车400英尺
rules.zhHant: 高速出口提前400英尺打燈；卡車55mph剎車400英尺

rules.en: School zone with children = 25 mph; dim for oncoming within 500 ft
rules.zh: 学区500英尺限25mph；会车500英尺切近光
rules.zhHant: 學區500英尺限25mph；會車500英尺切近光

rules.en: Turn on headlights when can't see objects 1000 ft ahead
rules.zh: 看不清前方1000英尺 → 开大灯
rules.zhHant: 看不清前方1000英尺 → 開大燈

groups.mnemonic_en: Compare: Fire hydrant 15ft vs Crosswalk 20ft (with extension 15ft); Car braking 300ft vs Truck 400ft
groups.mnemonic_zh: 对比：消防栓15ft vs 人行横道20ft（有延伸15ft）；客车刹车300ft vs 卡车400ft
groups.mnemonic_zhHant: 對比：消防栓15ft vs 人行橫道20ft（有延伸15ft）；客車剎車300ft vs 卡車400ft

questions.stem_en: When passing a bicyclist, you must maintain a minimum distance of:
questions.stem_zh: 超越自行车时，你必须保持至少多少距离？
questions.stem_zhHant: 超越自行車時，你必須保持至少多少距離？
questions.explanation_en: California law requires at least 3 feet of clearance when passing a bicyclist.
questions.explanation_zh: 加州法律要求超越自行车时保持至少3英尺距离。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州法律要求超越自行車時保持至少3英尺距離。

questions.stem_en: You should not park within ___ feet of a fire hydrant.
questions.stem_zh: 你不应在消防栓___英尺内停车。
questions.stem_zhHant: 你不應在消防栓___英尺內停車。
questions.explanation_en: Do not park within 15 feet of a fire hydrant.
questions.explanation_zh: 消防栓15英尺内禁停。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 消防栓15英尺內禁停。

questions.stem_en: When approaching an intersection with a crosswalk (no curb extension), you must not park within:
questions.stem_zh: 在无路缘延伸的人行横道旁，你不得在___英尺内停车：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在無路緣延伸的人行橫道旁，你不得在___英尺內停車：
questions.explanation_en: No parking within 20 feet of a regular crosswalk. If there is a curb extension (bulb-out), the limit is 15 feet.
questions.explanation_zh: 普通人行横道20英尺禁停（有延伸15英尺）。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 普通人行橫道20英尺禁停（有延伸15英尺）。

questions.stem_en: At 55 mph, the average braking distance for a large truck is:
questions.stem_zh: 在55 mph时，大卡车的平均刹车距离是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 在55 mph時，大卡車的平均剎車距離是：
questions.explanation_en: At 55 mph, a passenger car needs about 300 feet to stop, while a large truck needs approximately 400 feet.
questions.explanation_zh: 55mph时客车刹车300英尺，卡车400英尺。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 55mph時客車剎車300英尺，卡車400英尺。

questions.stem_en: You must turn on your headlights when you cannot see clearly for ___ feet ahead.
questions.stem_zh: 当你无法看清前方___英尺时，必须打开大灯。
questions.stem_zhHant: 當你無法看清前方___英尺時，必須打開大燈。
questions.explanation_en: Headlights are required when you cannot see objects clearly 1000 feet ahead.
questions.explanation_zh: 看不清前方1000英尺物体时必须开大灯。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 看不清前方1000英尺物體時必須開大燈。

rules.en: Safe following distance: 3-second rule
rules.zh: 跟车安全距离：3秒规则
rules.zhHant: 跟車安全距離：3秒規則

rules.en: Notify DMV within 5 days of selling a vehicle
rules.zh: 卖车5天内通知DMV
rules.zhHant: 賣車5天內通知DMV

rules.en: Minor must wait 7 days to retake written test
rules.zh: 未成年笔试不过等7天重考
rules.zhHant: 未成年筆試不過等7天重考

rules.en: Change address / transfer title / report crash to DMV — all 10 days
rules.zh: 搬家/买车/报事故都是10天
rules.zhHant: 搬家/買車/報事故都是10天

rules.en: Minor retake road test wait; request hearing by mail
rules.zh: 未成年路考不过等14天；邮寄通知14天要求听证
rules.zhHant: 未成年路考不過等14天；郵寄通知14天要求聽證

rules.en: Report injury/death crash to police within 24 hours
rules.zh: 伤亡车祸24小时内报警
rules.zhHant: 傷亡車禍24小時內報警

rules.en: Headlights: 30 min after sunset to 30 min before sunrise
rules.zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟 → 开大灯
rules.zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘 → 開大燈

groups.mnemonic_en: Selling = 5 days; Moving/Buying/Crash = 10 days; Minor written = 7 days, road = 14 days
groups.mnemonic_zh: 卖车5天；搬家/买车/事故10天；未成年笔试7天，路考14天
groups.mnemonic_zhHant: 賣車5天；搬家/買車/事故10天；未成年筆試7天，路考14天

questions.stem_en: After selling your vehicle, you must notify the DMV within:
questions.stem_zh: 卖车后，你必须在多少天内通知DMV？
questions.stem_zhHant: 賣車後，你必須在多少天內通知DMV？
questions.explanation_en: Notify the DMV within 5 days of selling your vehicle.
questions.explanation_zh: 卖车后5天内通知DMV。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 賣車後5天內通知DMV。

questions.stem_en: You must report a traffic accident to the DMV within ___ days if someone is injured or property damage exceeds $1,000.
questions.stem_zh: 如有人受伤或财产损失超过$1,000，你必须在___天内向DMV报告交通事故。
questions.stem_zhHant: 如有人受傷或財產損失超過$1,000，你必須在___天內向DMV報告交通事故。
questions.explanation_en: Report to DMV within 10 days if the crash involves injury, death, or property damage over $1,000.
questions.explanation_zh: 有人伤亡或财损超$1000 → 10天内报DMV。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 有人傷亡或財損超$1000 → 10天內報DMV。

questions.stem_en: Headlights must be turned on from:
questions.stem_zh: 大灯必须在什么时段开启？
questions.stem_zhHant: 大燈必須在什麼時段開啟？

options.text_en: 30 minutes after sunset to 30 minutes before sunrise
options.text_zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟
options.text_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘

questions.explanation_en: Headlights are required from 30 minutes after sunset to 30 minutes before sunrise.
questions.explanation_zh: 日落后30分钟到日出前30分钟必须开大灯。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘必須開大燈。

questions.stem_en: A minor who fails the written test must wait ___ days to retake it.
questions.stem_zh: 未成年人笔试不及格后需等待___天才能重考。
questions.stem_zhHant: 未成年人筆試不及格後需等待___天才能重考。
questions.explanation_en: Minors must wait 7 days to retake the written test. For the road test, the wait is 14 days.
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年笔试不过等7天重考；路考不过等14天。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年筆試不過等7天重考；路考不過等14天。

questions.stem_en: The safe following distance rule is:
questions.stem_zh: 安全跟车距离规则是：
questions.stem_zhHant: 安全跟車距離規則是：
questions.explanation_en: Maintain at least a 3-second following distance behind the vehicle ahead.
questions.explanation_zh: 跟车保持至少3秒距离。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 跟車保持至少3秒距離。

rules.en: Must use car seat in back seat (or under 4'9")
rules.zh: 8岁以下（或身高不足4'9"）后排安全座椅
rules.zhHant: 8歲以下（或身高不足4'9"）後排安全座椅

rules.en: Never leave alone in vehicle unless supervised by person 12+
rules.zh: 6岁以下不得独留车内，需12岁以上监督
rules.zhHant: 6歲以下不得獨留車內，需12歲以上監督

rules.en: 4 pts in 12 mo / 6 pts in 24 mo / 8 pts in 36 mo → license suspension
rules.zh: 12个月4分/24个月6分/36个月8分 → 吊销
rules.zhHant: 12個月4分/24個月6分/36個月8分 → 吊銷

rules.en: Max fine: ignoring school bus red lights, abandoning animal on highway
rules.zh: 无视校车红灯/弃动物于高速 → 最高$1000
rules.zhHant: 無視校車紅燈/棄動物於高速 → 最高$1000

rules.en: Suspension for: first DUI, refusing chemical test, ignoring school bus; fleeing police (misdemeanor) max jail
rules.zh: 初犯DUI/拒绝化学测试/无视校车 → 吊销1年；逃避警察最高监禁1年
rules.zhHant: 初犯DUI/拒絕化學測試/無視校車 → 吊銷1年；逃避警察最高監禁1年

groups.mnemonic_en: Points: 4-6-8 in 1-2-3 years; Minors: 2 violations = 30-day restriction, 3 = 6-month suspension
groups.mnemonic_zh: 扣分：4-6-8，1年2年3年；未成年2次禁驾30天，3次吊销6个月
groups.mnemonic_zhHant: 扣分：4-6-8，1年2年3年；未成年2次禁駕30天，3次吊銷6個月

questions.stem_en: A child under ___ years old must be secured in a car seat in the back seat.
questions.stem_zh: ___岁以下的儿童必须坐在后排安全座椅上。
questions.stem_zhHant: ___歲以下的兒童必須坐在後排安全座椅上。
questions.explanation_en: Children under 8 (or shorter than 4'9") must be in an approved car seat in the back seat.
questions.explanation_zh: 8岁以下（或身高不足4'9"）必须坐后排安全座椅。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 8歲以下（或身高不足4'9"）必須坐後排安全座椅。

questions.stem_en: Never leave a child ___ or younger alone in a vehicle unless supervised by a person aged ___ or older.
questions.stem_zh: 不得将___岁或以下的儿童独自留在车内，除非有___岁以上的人监督。
questions.stem_zhHant: 不得將___歲或以下的兒童獨自留在車內，除非有___歲以上的人監督。
questions.explanation_en: Never leave a child 6 or under alone in a vehicle without someone 12 or older supervising.
questions.explanation_zh: 6岁以下不得独留车内，除非有12岁以上监督。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 6歲以下不得獨留車內，除非有12歲以上監督。

questions.stem_en: Your license may be suspended if you accumulate ___ points in 12 months.
questions.stem_zh: 如果你在12个月内累积___分，你的驾照可能被吊销。
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在12個月內累積___分，你的駕照可能被吊銷。
questions.explanation_en: 4 points in 12 months, 6 points in 24 months, or 8 points in 36 months triggers suspension.
questions.explanation_zh: 12个月4分 / 24个月6分 / 36个月8分 → 吊销。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 12個月4分 / 24個月6分 / 36個月8分 → 吊銷。

questions.stem_en: The penalty for ignoring a school bus's flashing red lights can include a fine of up to:
questions.stem_zh: 无视校车闪烁红灯的罚款最高可达：
questions.stem_zhHant: 無視校車閃爍紅燈的罰款最高可達：
questions.explanation_en: Ignoring school bus red lights carries up to $1,000 in fines and possible 1-year license suspension.
questions.explanation_zh: 无视校车红灯 → 最高$1000罚款 + 可能吊销1年。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 無視校車紅燈 → 最高$1000罰款 + 可能吊銷1年。

questions.stem_en: A person convicted of fleeing police (a misdemeanor) faces up to ___ in county jail.
questions.stem_zh: 因逃避警察（轻罪）被定罪的人最高面临___的县监狱刑期。
questions.stem_zhHant: 因逃避警察（輕罪）被定罪的人最高面臨___的縣監獄刑期。
questions.explanation_en: Fleeing/evading police as a misdemeanor carries up to 1 year in county jail.
questions.explanation_zh: 逃避警察追捕（轻罪）→ 最高县监狱1年。
questions.explanation_zhHant: 逃避警察追捕（輕罪）→ 最高縣監獄1年。
